_comment_scan_roots: Do NOT add a bare "~" here: a blanket home walk makes gitleaks/trufflehog read the planted honeytoken decoys (~/.aws/credentials.bak, ~/.kube/decoy.kubeconfig, ~/.env), advancing their atime and self-tripping the honeytoken watch. List specific code roots instead; the stealer-target credential files are covered by scan_targets.
_comment_secrets: The webhook Authorization token and the Canarytoken DNS host are env-only and are NEVER read from this file: set CREDSENTINEL_WEBHOOK_AUTH and CREDSENTINEL_CANARY_HOST in the environment (e.g. /etc/credsentinel/credsentinel.env, mode 0600).
